violations.text: The floors in walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (back storage room) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

Soup was was observed held at (119,122) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC reheated food to proper temperature. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024

Various food product was observed held at (47-54) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Unit taken out of service. Establishment not allowed to store any TCS foods in unit until repaired.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024
